calendar.matters:
FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for Debra Dolch (Successor Trustee).

The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Shannon.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (47 Clarendon Ave (Vacant Lot) & 53 Clarendon Ave)
Off Calendar Sep-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $2,210,000.00, (order for the same signed in open court). An additional bond in the amount of $1,668,600.00 is required. The ex-parte order Authorizing the Successor Trustee to Amend the Current Listing Agreement for Sale of the Property was signed in open court.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Padilla, CSR 975. Clerk: R. Noguera/ J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy T. Aguerre.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (47 Clarendon Ave ( Vacant Lot) & 53 Clarendon Ave)
Off Calendar Sep-03-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for Debra Dolch (Trustee).

The Court informed Ms. Robello that the amended petition was not timely, that there was a discrepancy between the original petition and the amended petition with regard to the real property and the lot being inventoried, and that the appraisal should breakdown the value of the two properties. In addition, the Court stated that the order to sell the real property dated April 28, 2008 needed to be amended, that the fourth accounting only listed the real property at 53 Clarendon and could be cured by the fifth accounting. Furthermore, the Court stated that the overbid amounts listed on both petitions were incorrect, that the description of the properties needed to be corrected, and that a second amended petition needed to be filed. Today's petition was taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: J. Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Wong.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order
